profile.name: Sruthi Gade
profile.title: BUSINESS DATA ANALYST
profile.bio: Business Data Analyst with 3+ years of experience translating complex business requirements into actionable, data-driven insights across healthcare and enterprise consulting environments. Strong expertise in SQL, Python, Power BI, Tableau, and cloud-based analytics platforms, with proven ability to improve operational efficiency, reduce costs, and support executive decision-making. Adept at stakeholder management, KPI design, data modeling, predictive analysis, and end-to-end analytics delivery within Agile and regulated environments. Consistently delivered measurable business impact through advanced analytics, automation, and scalable reporting solutions.
